Privacy

Privacy is the default

We don’t have a data strategy, because we don’t take your data. Here is exactly how each app behaves — in plain language.

Four rules, every app

No data collection

Our apps do not collect personal data. There are no servers receiving your information.

No accounts

No sign-ups, no logins, no passwords. Every app works the moment you open it.

No analytics

We do not include analytics or tracking SDKs. We cannot see how you use our apps — and that is the point.

Local storage only

Your data is stored on your device. Deleting an app deletes its data, completely and immediately.

Privacy per app

The summary below links to each app’s full privacy policy — the same document referenced on the App Store.

BreathWell

No data collected. No ads, no analytics, no account — everything stays on your device.

Ads

Analytics

Account
Not required

On device only

Privacy questions?

We answer every privacy question personally — usually within two business days.
